author: KevinChunye
name: 12L XSA-all + Partial RoPE + Batch 786K
blurb: 12-layer architecture with XSA on all 12 layers, partial RoPE (16/64 dims), and 786K batch size. Systematic ablation across 11 experiments on 1xH100 identified 3 complementary improvements stacking to -0.0152 BPB. Full stack: SmearGate, BigramHash, EMA, GPTQ-lite int6 + zstd-22, Late QAT. 8xH100 results pending.
technique_summary: 12L+3x MLP, XSA all 12 layers, Partial RoPE 16/64, Batch 786K, SmearGate, BigramHash 2048x128, EMA 0.997, GPTQ-lite int6 + zstd-22, Late QAT
